title: Project SEKAI Gameplay Tips – Batch Summary Schema
description: Aggregated analytical summary for a difficulty-homogeneous batch of Project SEKAI charts. Derived from per-chart canonical summary blocks.

batch_id.description: Optional identifier for this batch (difficulty-ordered block).

difficulty.description: Difficulty level shared by all charts in this batch.

chart_count.description: Number of charts included in this batch.

element_frequency.description: Aggregated count of element occurrences across all charts.

severity_distribution.description: Aggregated distribution of severity labels across all charts.

avg_score.description: Average of per-chart average dominance scores.

avg_section_coverage.description: Average of per-chart average section coverage values.

dominant_total.description: Total number of dominant elements identified across all charts.

dominant_selected_count.description: Count of dominant elements that were successfully selected into tips.

dominant_selection_ratio.description: Ratio of selected dominant elements to total dominant elements.

charts_with_full_dominant_coverage.description: Number of charts where all dominant elements were selected.

charts_with_zero_dominant_coverage.description: Number of charts where none of the dominant elements were selected.

score_distribution.description: Optional distribution statistics for dominance scores.

top_elements.description: Optional ranked list of most frequent elements.

count.description: Total count of this element in the batch.

share.description: Proportion of this element among all element occurrences.

tips_compliance.description: Optional diagnostics about tips generation compliance.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes for diagnostics or commentary.
